mapper.select:
select m.id, m.email, m.nickname, m.real_name as real_name, m.birth_date as birth_date, m.bio, m.profile_image as profile_image, m.role, m.status, m.creator_verified as creator_verified, m.seller_verified as seller_verified, m.creator_tier as creator_tier, m.follower_count as follower_count, m.following_count as following_count, m.gallery_count as gallery_count, m.phone_number as phone_number, m.last_login_datetime as last_login_datetime, m.created_datetime as created_datetime, m.updated_datetime as updated_datetime, ( select o.provider from tbl_oauth o where o.member_id = m.id limit 1 ) as oauth_provider, ( select count(*) from tbl_work w where w.member_id = m.id and w.deleted_datetime is null ) as work_count, ( select count(distinct b.auction_id) from tbl_bid b where b.member_id = m.id ) as auction_participate_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_order o2 where o2.seller_id = m.id and o2.status = 'COMPLETED' ) as sold_count, coalesce(( select sum(o3.total_price) from tbl_order o3 where o3.seller_id = m.id and o3.status = 'COMPLETED' ), 0) as total_trade_amount, ( select count(*) from tbl_withdrawal_request wr where wr.member_id = m.id and wr.status = 'PENDING' ) as pending_withdrawal_count, ( select to_char(max(o4.completed_at), 'YY.MM.DD') from tbl_order o4 where o4.buyer_id = m.id or o4.seller_id = m.id ) as last_transaction_date, ( select count(*) from tbl_payment p where p.buyer_id = m.id and p.status = 'REFUNDED' ) as refund_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_member_restriction mr where mr.member_id = m.id ) as restriction_history_count
from tbl_member m where m.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_member set status = #{status}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
